programme.title: The Closer: Smells Like Murder

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: Unable to locate Stroh in the present, the squad looks for answers in his past, hunting for the former Ms. Bechtal. Meanwhile, the squad struggles with Chief Mason, and Rusty grows frustrated with forced proximity to Gus.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: Phillip Stroh and his young British accomplice edge closer and close to their end game, while Lt. Provenza continues to push Asst. Chief Leo Mason into pouring more resources into the case. Rusty digs up an important clue.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Jane and Maura must put aside their differences when they investigate the case of a college student who died in a tunnel. Meanwhile, Frankie Sr. returns with news that upsets Angela.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Horror in Apartment 345
programme.desc: Gorgeous 27-year-old Sasha Samsudean appears to be sexually assaulted and is found strangled in her luxury downtown Orlando apartment. Shocking surveillance video and a slew of clues ultimately lead investigators to the killer.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Murder in the Church
programme.desc: Missy Bevers was a mom and a fitness instructor in her community. As she’s setting up for an early-morning workout class at the local church, surveillance cameras capture a disturbing series of images; her killer, lurking the halls.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Crazy, Sexy and Deadly
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers and Ryan Poston seemed like a match made in heaven, until he ends up dead in a pool of blood, shot in the face. Stunning interrogation tapes leave cops in disbelief and lead investigators to a surprising motive.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Chained by a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Prominent realtor Todd Kohlhepp’s double life is exposed when police launch a dramatic rescue – all caught on body camera – of a young woman chained like a dog inside a shipping container on his property.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Risky Doubles
programme.desc: A million-dollar aircraft is searched for, and a two-vehicle snatch is performed.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.desc: Mysterious reports of boiling seas in the Bermuda Triangle might be evidence of a deadly undersea volcano with a long list of victims. Jeremy Wade investigates the newest discoveries from this strange stretch of water in search of proof.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: NASA's Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the whereabouts of a lost relic of the Space Age that tarnished the reputation of NASA's first astronauts; as cutting-edge technology turns up brand-new evidence, experts might finally vindicate this American hero.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade chases new leads in pursuit of the Loch Ness Monster's hiding place. Using the latest evidence and state-of-the-art science, experts might finally reveal the truth behind this legendary monster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for Noah's Ark

programme.desc: Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys leap to action with huge builds including a blacksmith shop, but tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: When Cows Attack
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Yes, cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build, and the race is on to finish the project before father Paul must leave for work.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Hill of Death
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. Marty risks all forming a road up a bedrock cliff to a forest crawling with mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Vianey and Allen's Story

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Krystal's Journey
programme.desc: Krystal began overeating to shield herself with a protective layer of obesity after suffering years of abuse. Once a means of protection, her pathological eating now threatens to destroy her life if she doesn't get help.

programme.desc: Isaac helped raise his siblings after his mom suffered a debilitating stroke when he was 10. While learning to cook for his family, he began comfort-eating. Now to avoid eating himself to death, Isaac must learn to take care of himself for a change.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dominique's severe addiction to food prevented her from losing enough pounds to have weight loss surgery. This single mom of six continues to struggle with her diet.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: Jazz announces her college decision, setting her anxiety in motion. She struggles to plan a drag show fundraiser for Noelle's gender confirmation surgery. And during Jojo's breast consultation an explosive confrontation threatens to tear the family apart.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Christmas Miracles and Meltdowns
programme.desc: It's Christmas and the first with the sextuplets at home. Courtney and Eric disagree on whether to sell their house and land while trying to continue their family traditions. The boys put their parents to the test when they want to keep a puppy.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Holding on and Letting Go
programme.desc: Courtney struggles to pay attention to the big boys when they celebrate their combo birthday party and must deal with her separation anxiety when it comes to the babies. Eric's plan to save the farm puts him at odds with Courtney.

programme.desc: Samantha's already shopped at 100 different bridal stores without ever finding the right dress and her bullying mom is not helping. Last Minute Lia, on the other hand, has never tried a single gown and has to leave with one today.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hot on the Heels
programme.desc: The game wardens are on the lookout for over eager sportsmen trying to bend the rules as the season comes to close. One warden catches a Canadian posing as an American while others bring a fugitive to justice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Takedown
programme.desc: As sportsmen arrive to take part in Maine's big game season, the wardens keep a watchful eye for night hunters and track down a deer poacher. Then, some hunters from out of state get a lesson in Maine's hunting laws.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Autumn's arrival brings hunters heading for the woods, keeping the wardens busy. While some obey the rules, others try to get around them. Sergeant Simmons and Warden McKenney investigate a poached moose.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Sly Squatters
programme.desc: Tensions run high when an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that may be linked to a cold case. A team is deployed to help local police find a missing teen, while a group of sly squatters attempt to hide from local law enforcement.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Squirrel Shakedown
programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Sly Squatters
programme.desc: Tensions run high when an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that may be linked to a cold case. A team is deployed to help local police find a missing teen, while a group of sly squatters attempt to hide from local law enforcement.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: A stolen ATV steers Parker through a maze of suspects. Carter races to a domestic violence dispute. Marquis and Fitzpatrick set up a sting for a suspected night hunter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Buck Fever
programme.desc: In the final week of Maine's deer season, some hunters are desperate to bag a buck. Warden Robertson confronts a felon with an illegal gun and a pile of bait. Warden Carter investigates teen hunters terrorizing a neighborhood.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Homecoming
programme.desc: The game wardens bring closure at long last to one of the most confounding mysteries in Maine Warden Service history. They later reflect on their years of service.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: The wardens encounter all types of people willing to stretch the truth to get out of hot water. Warden Parker searches for a trigger-happy shooter in a family neighborhood. Sergeant Spahr and Warden Lounder investigate a suspiciously shot turkey.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: They Shoot Crocodiles Don't They
programme.desc: Steve turns the camera around to introduce the photographers who film his adventures.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Tigers of Shark Bay
programme.desc: In this adventure, Steve learns how to trap an 11-foot tiger shark in a plastic bag.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocs in the City
programme.desc: Steve is called in Mexico to investigate the proximity of the crocodiles in Tampico.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Alligator Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Robert feeds 44 hungry alligators, all at the same time. Terri helps examine Kaitlynn the tiger and makes a thrilling discovery, while Bindi follows the heartbreaking story of her old friends, Zambezi the Zebra.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Meditating Maple
programme.desc: Pete finds the perfect treehouse spot in West Seattle for a couple seeking a meditation space - 20 ft up in a twisting pair of maples. The NTS team channels their chakras, creating a healing space fit for both humans AND four-legged friends alike.

programme.title: Tanked!: Give a Dog a Phone
programme.desc: A business communications company is in need of an interactive aquarium shaped like a giant telephone. Later, the ATM crew have to build a tank that can be used as a dog house.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The One
programme.desc: Tia and her staff scramble to coax a scared dog, hiding under a vehicle, to safety. Tania's in-laws are seeking a new addition to their home. Tia's son Moe and his fiancée Lizzy prepare for their wedding day.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Behind Bars
programme.desc: Tia enlists Matt's help adopting a patrol dog out to his former home, Dixon prison. Then, Tia gets a call about two dogs left behind when their owners abandoned the property. And, Tania has trouble letting go when Brandi is up for adoption.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Submerged
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are all hands on deck after a massive flash flood. Game Wardens rush to a gas station that could explode. A patrol through the Rio Grande leads to an unexpected encounter. Game Wardens investigate an illegally killed hawk.

programme.title: Snapped: Yalanda Lind
programme.desc: Years after a deadly home invasion, a Texas woman faces new questions about the death of her mother.

programme.title: Snapped: Omaima Nelson
programme.desc: When a beautiful woman's much older husband disappears under mysterious circumstances, police suspect that more than just the woman's story has been cooked up.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Cole
programme.desc: A suspicious fire hides a deadly secret and forces a son to testify against his only remaining parent.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: The Buried Truth
programme.desc: After the battered body of a young woman is found dumped at a landfill in Lubbock, Texas detectives race to collect evidence hidden in acres of trash. The elusive killer's attempt to bury the truth might hold the key to unlocking the mystery.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: Pattern of Violence
programme.desc: A brutal murder of a college student in Vincennes, Indiana, may go unsolved until a second crime puts detectives on the heels of a serial killer. As the investigation deepens, police turn to the killer's shocking pattern of violence for clues.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: Out of the Darkness
programme.desc: The body of Kathy Blair, a choir director, is found stabbed to death in her bedroom in Austin, Texas. The gruesome crime scene puzzles investigators until an unlikely clue captured in the darkness puts them on the trail of a depraved killer.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: A Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Investigators in Prince George's County, Maryland are chasing the shadow of a brutal killer who is targeting mothers and daughters. The investigation brings them face to face with a predator, unlike anything they have encountered before.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: The Buried Truth
programme.desc: After the battered body of a young woman is found dumped at a landfill in Lubbock, Texas detectives race to collect evidence hidden in acres of trash. The elusive killer's attempt to bury the truth might hold the key to unlocking the mystery.

programme.desc: Investigators in Prince George's County, Maryland are chasing the shadow of a brutal killer who is targeting mothers and daughters. The investigation brings them face to face with a predator, unlike anything they have encountered before.

programme.title: The Disappearance of the Millbrook Twins
programme.desc: Former federal prosecutor Laura Coates and former homicide detective Page Reynolds attempt to unravel the mysterious unsolved case of the disappearance of the Millbrook Twins.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House on the Lake

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House On Sidney's Cove
programme.desc: Nique Leili was juggling family and a thriving career. Then, she vanished. Police found something unusual: Nique's last months were recorded on security cameras around her home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Out There in the Dark
programme.desc: Brandy Daniels believed someone was stalking her. Then, the single mother was found slumped over in her car, shot dead. Investigators would spend years navigating the twists and turns searching for her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Sam and Danielle Dreher appeared to have a storybook marriage but this ending was not happily ever after. When Sam was murdered, investigators discovered a twisted tale of secrets, lies and infidelity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Graduation Night
programme.desc: It started with a party, high school seniors celebrating graduation. Before the night was through, one man was dead and two teens were facing a long fight for justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Written In Blood
programme.desc: When Karen Pannell was found stabbed to death, a message scrawled in blood seemed like a beacon that could lead detectives to her killer. But what exactly did it mean? It would take a dogged forensic specialist with a keen eye to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Bala
programme.desc: Gloria becomes involved in the dangerous world of cross-border crime. In order to survive, she finds a power she never knew she had. Relying on all of the cunning and strength she can muster, she fights her way out.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Fountain of Youth Found?
programme.desc: A strange structure shaped like a giant shark might point the way to a lost civilization's fountain of youth. A massive hurricane heads toward Florida, but something unexpected is in its eye.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost of Zorro
programme.desc: A giant letter Z is carved into a Mexican hillside, evoking the mark of a legendary outlaw. A strange sighting in Germany points to secrets from the Cold War. Massive, blood-red marks in China prompt fears of a violent government crackdown.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Satan in Siberia
programme.desc: A satanic symbol points to an army of the dead in Siberia. A massive stone giant's in a remote desert. Evidence of a Russian doomsday device is right on America's doorstep. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lake of Blood
programme.desc: Six breathtaking images reveal six unfathomable mysteries.

programme.title: Above and Beyond: NASA's Journey to Tomorrow
programme.desc: As NASA celebrates its 60th anniversary, Discovery shines a spotlight on this historic institution and the vital role it has to play moving forward into the coming decades.

programme.title: NASA's Greatest Missions: Cassini: Saturn's Quest
programme.desc: In 1997, NASA's Cassini mission embarked on a quest to examine the rings of Saturn, a cosmic wonder that has baffled scientists for centuries; now, new evidence reveals the true story behind these enigmatic structures and how they're astonishingly young.

programme.title: NASA's Greatest Missions: Juno: The Mission to Jupiter
programme.desc: In 2011, NASA launched the Juno spacecraft on an audacious mission to explore the secrets of Jupiter; now, questions that have long puzzled planetary explorers are finally revealed, uncovering the enigma of how the entire solar system was formed.

programme.title: NASA's Greatest Missions: Voyager: Secrets of the Beyond
programme.desc: In 1977, NASA began the landmark Voyager missions to probe into the vast, outer reaches of the solar system; now, scientists examine the profound impact of these remarkable explorations and how they have shaped our entire understanding of the cosmos.

programme.title: NASA's Greatest Missions: Pluto: Mission of New Horizons
programme.desc: In 2006, a visionary team of NASA scientists began the New Horizons mission to capture up-close images of Pluto for the first time; now, this astonishing exploration reveals a surprisingly active world once thought geologically dead.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen Innocence
programme.desc: On a chilly winter morning in St. Louis, an eleven year old girl vanishes. Days later her body is found along an icy river bank. She's been brutally murdered. It's a race against time for investigators who fear the elusive killer will strike again.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Wrath of Love
programme.desc: Zach Sanders is being pulled in two directions between the woman he loves and his mistress who refuses to let him go. Jealousy, obsession and news of a surprise engagement leads to a deadly case of road rage.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Wheeling and Dealing
programme.desc: Feb. 24, 1996, Frank Black Jr., the owner of a school bus company, goes missing. The FBI needs to determine if he is dead, and where's his body? It's a mystery built on lies that can only be solved when someone is brave enough, to tell the truth.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Flames of Fury
programme.desc: When firefighter Chip Taylor's house goes up in flames, investigators soon find that the fire was intentionally set to cover up the triple homicide of Chip, his wife, and her young daughter.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.desc: Stephanie Crane, aged 9, walks home from the local bowling alley-but never arrives. Early leads go nowhere. For years authorities don't find her or make an arrest. Now, they hope that advances in evidence testing may finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Last Summer
programme.desc: When 15 yr-old Kayla Berg isn't home after a night out, her loved ones believe she's staying with friends. But when six days pass and the aspiring gymnast is missing, the details of her last known whereabouts raise suspicion in a close-knit town.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Beneath the Stairs
programme.desc: Curiosity overcomes new homeowners when they spot a barrel in a crawlspace. When they open it, they are horrified to find a body.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Blood on the Court
programme.desc: When a basketball star goes missing, his college sports community is thrust into a deadly scandal.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Date with Dystiny
programme.desc: When firefighters extinguish a California brush fire, they unexpectedly ignite a twisted murder mystery- rife with forced prostitution, burning jealousy, and an almost unthinkable murder mastermind.

programme.title: To Catch a Killer: When a Killer Calls
programme.desc: Christmas night takes a frightening turn when a Greensboro teen is found brutally murdered. As the killer taunts the victim's family, Detective Mike Terry works tirelessly to bring this fugitive to justice, putting his own personal life on the line.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Secrets on the Lake
programme.desc: In 2000, 31-year-old Mike Williams vanished while duck hunting on a Florida lake. His boat and his shotgun were found, but not his body. Seventeen years later, a violent kidnapping led detectives to suspects who had been there all along.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Footsteps in Blood
programme.desc: A man calls 911 when he finds blood inside a friend's home. Officers enter to find a beloved community activist shot dead. Detectives piece together clues bloody footprints, bullet fragments, a credit card trail to find a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Such a Pretty Girl
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Carrie Jopek has disappeared. For her terrified friends and family, she seems to have vanished into thin air. But soon after, her body is found underneath a neighbour's porch -- which sets off a hunt for her killer that spans decades.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A man is viciously murdered less than one month after arriving from the Phillpines to join his resettled wife in Calgary. Detective Thomas Barrow always prided himself on being able to read people, but is haunted when his instincts fail.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps

programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Landscape Plans, Roof Deck
programme.desc: Landscape architect Greg Lombardi presents a yard plan with traditional and modern elements. Tom shows Kevin how he's gotten rid of the steps to the roof deck. Roger arrives to tackle the stump of the old Norway maple with a chainsaw and a stump grinder.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Exterior Improvements
programme.desc: Mason Mark McCullogh repoints the old brick foundation with great care and a type N mortar. Kevin visits Community Rowing to see how they make the Cambridge pastime of rowing available to everyone, including kids, disabled vets and general contractors.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Old and New in Harmony
programme.desc: Roger replaces the concrete front walk with new bluestone design. Architect Michael Kim shows Kevin how he also planned a modern house inside the shell of an old home in Brookline and how modern and traditional live in harmony.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.desc: Disabled policewoman's townhouse has more problems than she can handle.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: A daughter and mother call on Brett to restore a 1927 arts and crafts house that's lost some character over the years. While restoring the home, Brett unexpectedly discovers a hidden masterpiece.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hope Rises in White Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After the flood waters recede, the Barnwood Builders join the recovery efforts in their hometown of White Sulphur Springs, WV. They build a timber frame pavilion as the centerpiece of a memorial park, and the community builds barn wood picnic tables.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys sit down to talk about a few of their favourite things: cabins and barns. With special guests, never-before-seen footage and hilarious outtakes, the builders are having fun. Mark also talks about his new house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cowboy Party Barn in New Braunfels, TX
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to Texas to build a gigantic party barn out of an old timber frame. They use old-fashioned tools to retrofit the barn for modern use, and they install a rare swing beam in the center bent.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the crew start a new boneyard in Texas by building a timber frame barn and two log cabins with some help from their new business partner. Mark gets his first look at the incredible party barn they built the last time they were in Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: You've Got Ale

programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: It's Pony: Loud Horse/ Sick Annie
programme.desc: When a noisy neighbor drives Annie to the brink, she and Pony have to find a way to quiet her down. When Annie gets sick and can't ride the new rollercoaster, Pony tries everything to make her better.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Land
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into an amusement park.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snowball Effect/ One Krab's Trash
programme.desc: Pat and SpongeBob play in the snow; Mr. Krabs sells trash as antiques.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!
programme.desc: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Slink or Swim/ The Big Chill
programme.desc: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves. After begging Abuelo for A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guess Who's Shopping for Dinner/ New Roomie
programme.desc: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Kid Plays in the Picture/ Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: Carl’s love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career./ Frida’s art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Normal Boy/ Birth of a Salesman
programme.desc: Jimmy invents a machine to make himself less smart; Jimmy uses his genius to sell candy.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Brobot/ The Big Pinch
programme.desc: Jimmy constructs the perfect little brother; Jimmy brings Thomas Edison to the present.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Battle of the Bands/ Jimmy on Ice
programme.desc: Jimmy, Carl and Sheen form a band to beat out Cindy and Libby in a talent contest.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: My Son the Hamster/ Phantom of Retroland
programme.desc: Jimmy's teleporting goof-up leads to him switching heads with Carl's per hamster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Hypnobirthday to You/ Hall Monster
programme.desc: Jimmy hypnotizes into thinking it's his birthday; Jimmy is picked as hall monster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Crime Sheen Investigation/ Safety First
programme.desc: Jimmy tries to find Sheen's missing action figure; Jimmy invents a way to stop his bully.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Ultra Sheen / Sleepless in Retroville
programme.desc: Jimmy invents a machine that maximizes sleepover fun, but Carl sits on a keyboard, and mistakenly creates a pizza-monster that causes trouble.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Party at Neutron's/ Broadcast Blues
programme.desc: When Hugh and Judy go out for the evening, Jimmy invites the gang over for a party.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: A Beautiful Mine
programme.desc: When a meteor encrusted with precious gems plummets to earth, Jimmy and company head into space to mine the priceless asterubies. There, they encounter a trio of space bandits who wish to relieve them of their treasure.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Return of the Nanobots
programme.desc: Jimmy's attempts to update the Nanobots lead to a lot of trouble.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Attack of the Twonkies
programme.desc: When Jimmy accidentally brings home a furry space creature, Carl wants it as a pet.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Sheen's Brain
programme.desc: Jimmy turns his Brain Drain helmet into a Brain Gain helmet and uses it on his buddy, Sheen, instantly quadrupling Sheen's IQ.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Yard/ Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Hyper-potamus Pizza-Party-torium
programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Doonkleberry Imperative/ Buford Confidential
programme.desc: The boys go out in search of Doonkelberries so that Mom can make her famous pie.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: For Whom the Crow Caws
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: CupQuake vs. Red
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry Lays an Egg/ Gaming the System
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an egg, which they believe belongs to Perry, so they build a mechanical contraption to care for it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kreioke Night / The Mascot Upshot
programme.desc: Krei enlists Big Hero 6 to help launch his latest invention, a karaoke machine he calls 'Kreioke.' Hiro plans to defeat The Mascots once and for all.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Quarantined
programme.desc: Bree is exposed to a dangerous toxic chemical, sending Adam and Chase on a mission for an antidote. Bree escapes quarantine and when her side effects kick in it's up to Leo to get her back to her capsule.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Hole in One
programme.desc: The Lab Rats ruin a multi-million dollar painting and attempt to get away with forging it, but when it doesn't work they must try to retrieve the original.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Prank You Very Much
programme.desc: Bree partners with Tasha on the ultimate prank.

programme.title: Lab Rats: My Little Brother
programme.desc: Chase causes Adam to shrink down to two inches and uses the opportunity for payback.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Trent Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Leo and Chase use Davenport's technology to get back at Trent on the day of a big test. Meanwhile, Bree gets exposed to a hair growth cream and has disastrous results.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Mission: Mission Creek High
programme.desc: Now that she knows their secret, Principal Perry pesters the team to take her on a bionic mission. When they stage a fake mission, things don't go as planned, and they have to save Mission Creek High from a speeding rocket.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Not So Smart Phone
programme.desc: Chase and Adam record themselves doing bionic stunts but then have to scramble to find the phone they used before their secret is exposed. Meanwhile, Leo and Bree scheme to help Perry spend her fortune.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Scramble the Orbs
programme.desc: Leo invents his first high end technology and when he tests the orbs on himself and they appear to work fine. However, problems arise when the orbs can't differentiate between friend and foe and start attacking anyone who comes into contact with Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Taken
programme.desc: Fearful of Krane's plan to destroy the Lab Rats, Douglas makes an attempt to warn the Lab Rats and Davenport about Krane’s evil agenda, but is rebuffed by Davenport.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Which Father Knows Best?
programme.desc: Davenport’s attempts at rebuilding Bree’s bionic chip fail, forcing Leo to go behind his back and ask his brother Douglas for help. However, when the chip becomes life threatening the two brothers are forced to work together.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Principle From Another Planet
programme.desc: Leo is determined to capture the bizarre events he believes take place during a lunar eclipse with his video camera.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Leo promises Douglas he'll keep his new bionic arm a secret but when he can't resist showing off in front of Janelle, his arm quickly goes out of control and ends up trapping her in a fire.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Final Stage! Facing Aiger!
Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.desc: A professional dancer uses ballet to help a hockey player get back in the game.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: Movie: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: A couple continue on their journey to see the vineyard succeed. While things have been challenging at times, the pair are united in their passion to see the business succeed. Looking toward the future, a wedding might be their next big investment.

programme.title: Movie: Love, of Course
programme.desc: A widowed mother moves her daughter to an out-of-state college dorm and is forced to take the next step in her life. While at the university, she meets a professor and discovers herself on a new path, to love.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Miles to Go
programme.desc: The girls find out that Rose's boyfriend is in a witness protection program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Dorothy has been sneaking around so that Sophia doesn't discover that she's been dating Stan. However, when Stan proposes, Dorothy must reveal the truth to Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Totally against Dorothy and Stan's impending nuptials, Sophia vows to not let the ceremony go off. Meanwhile, Blanche begins interviewing for a new roommate since Dorothy is planning to move out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser
programme.desc: Wanting someone to watch after Sophia during the day, Dorothy gets Sophia a job under false pretenses. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose are all excited about being hired as models for a Penny Saver.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Melodrama
programme.desc: Blanche wants to intensify her relationship with her infamous one-night-stand-man, Mel Bushman. Meanwhile, Rose tries her hand at TV reporting. Her assignment: a dog show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Even Grandmas Get the Blues
programme.desc: While babysitting for her granddaughter, a man mistakes Blanche as being the baby's mother and Blanche does nothing to set him straight. Meanwhile, Sophia gets ready for the Festival of the Dancing Virgins.

programme.title: Frasier: Goodnight, Seattle
programme.desc: When Martin reserves the wedding hall for the wrong date, Niles and Frasier offer to help.

programme.title: Frasier: Goodnight, Seattle

programme.title: Frasier: Space Quest
programme.desc: Frasier tries to find a quiet corner to read his book, but he is always disturbed.

programme.title: Frasier: Dinner at Eight
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles take their father out for a meal but end up at The Timber Mill instead.

programme.title: Frasier: I Hate Frasier Crane
programme.desc: A newspaper critic puts down Frasier's radio show, forcing him to retaliate on the air.

programme.title: Frasier: Here's Looking at You
programme.desc: Martin uses a telescope to scope out a romantic interest in the adjacent building.

programme.title: Reba: Mommy Nearest
programme.desc: When Reba takes a full-time job, Jake starts calling Barbra Jean 'mommy.'

programme.title: Reba: Switch
programme.desc: When Reba has a disastrous date, she is talked into trying speed dating.

programme.title: Reba: Ring-a-Ding
programme.desc: Reba invites her new beau Brian home to meet her family. Brock and the children attend Barbra Jean's family reunion.

programme.title: Reba: Ring-a-Ding
programme.desc: Reba invites her new beau Brian home to meet her family. Brock and the children attend Barbra Jean's family reunion.

programme.title: Reba: Cookies for Santa
programme.desc: Reba is disappointed when she learns that she will be spending Christmas Eve alone.

programme.title: Reba: A Moment in Time
programme.desc: Feelings are hurt when the Harts create a video time capsule for Elizabeth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness
programme.desc: Rose has a new man, Carl, in her life but suddenly out of the blue Miles returns, still undercover in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: Movie: Snowkissed
programme.desc: A travel-averse journalist chases her dream assignment where she unwillingly finds herself mentoring a handsome B&B owner who wants to be a tour guide.

programme.title: Movie: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince parents to approve of her boyfriend. She finds herself questioning her own life choices.

programme.title: Movie: Sailing Into Love

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Burgess Family
programme.desc: Long-time partner Goodman Manufacturing makes upgrades to the HVAC system; Designer Jennifer Bertrand visits Norris Furniture; and Busch Garden treats the family to a day of fun.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Haunt You Every Day
programme.desc: Halloween is full of surprise for the Seattle Grace doctors. Ava makes an unexpected visit to see Alex, Meredith thinks her deceased mother is haunting her and Callie reveals George and Izzie's affair to fellow doctors.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Kung Fu Fighting
programme.desc: With his marriage in turmoil, the Chief turns to his fellow male surgeons for a gentlemen's evening. Cristina and Izzie heatedly compete for the same surgeries and Meredith treats the victim of a sky diving accident.

programme.title: The Closer: Maternal Instincts
programme.desc: A shooting spree in broad daylight leaves two people dead, another critically wounded and a car loaded with marijuana. But there's some confusion as to the identity of the intended victim and the motive behind the crime.

programme.title: The Closer: Waivers of Extradition
programme.desc: After the stabbing death of a woman who was apparently killed by someone wearing a ninja outfit, Brenda and the squad realize they might have a bigger case on their hands than they thought.

programme.title: Major Crimes: By Any Means
programme.desc: In the series finale, Lt. Tao is stuck in a room with a potential bomb. Provenza finally identifies the real Ms. Bechtal, and Major Crimes comes face-to-face for the very last time with Phillip Stroh.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Reloaded
programme.desc: There is little time for adjustment for the newly appointed head of Major Crimes, when the department is rushing to reach a plea regarding a string of grocery store robberies that turns fatal. Meanwhile, Raydor takes a big step to protect Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Before and After
programme.desc: The division works to obtain justice in a brutal homicide, but it turns out to be more complicated than expected. Raydor struggles to gain the respect of her colleagues and to keep supervising Rusty 24/7.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Crazy for You
programme.desc: The detectives must piece together partial clues to lead them to the murderer of a husband-and-wife team of psychiatrists. Jane finds herself closer to the investigation than she realizes.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Miracle Dog
programme.desc: Paul and Alison Frase were told their child's disorder had no treatment and no cure. Scientists tell them their one hope depends on finding a dog and the right genetic code; they set on a quest to find that one-in-a-million dog.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Outbreak
programme.desc: Patients surface with similar symptoms and doctors have to act fast if they hope to save lives.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Mysterious Epidemic
programme.desc: On September 29, 1982, seven unsuspecting Chicago-area residents are stricken, and then died under mysterious medical circumstances. When the actual cause of death was discovered, a task force was formed to investigate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: BattleBots: Now or Never

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Fox Cabin Finale
programme.desc: Atz Sr. reveals his Fox Cabin legacy build after months of backbreaking effort. As winter begins, Eivin scrambles to complete a vital project he'd fallen behind on. Jane and Atz Lee attempt to airlift a piano to their remote cabin before snowfall.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Spring Has Sprung
programme.desc: Spring has sprung on the homestead. Atz and family head out on a black bear hunt, but as Jane's confidence gets stronger, Atz Sr's waivers. Otto gives CPR to two prematurely born calves. Eve plants the family garden while Eivin takes on her arch nemesis.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Spring Delicacy
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane climb reefs to hunt for octopus. Jane must face her fear of heights or be trapped by the tide. Otto struggles to keep a newborn calf alive during the annual spring cattle drive. Eve gives Eivin news that will change the homestead forever.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Parlors and Poop Chutes

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Outhouses, Cow Bras and Bears, Oh My!

programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.
