programme.desc: Kourtney tries to keep it together as Scott's behavior spirals out of control, but when he's photographed in France with another woman, Kourtney is not sure how much more she can take. Khloé decides she must meet Caitlyn face to face.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: That Was Then This Is Now
programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Price You Pay
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to find a new status quo with Scott while the rest of the family worries she's give in to him too easily. Khloé thinks twice about how much she does for her sisters. Kris braces for landfall as Kim and Kanye prepare to move back in.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: When Kylie graduates from high school, Kris decides to throw an extra special party. Kim's pregnancy cravings take her half way around the world. Khloé responds to a presence in her house by getting in touch with her psychic side.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Kylie's 18th birthday gives Kris a reason to meet Caitlyn for the first time. History repeats itself as Kim takes over Kris' home in preparation for baby number two. Khloé takes steps to move forward.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Forecasting a Win
programme.desc: America's favorite weatherman, Al Roker, joins Food Network's Katie Lee to bring a torrential downpour on Bobby Flay's day. Chefs Maris Grubb and Justin Walker will be cooking up a storm to try to rain on Bobby's parade.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sweet, Sweet Revenge!
programme.desc: Brooklyn pastry chefs Clarice Lam and Caroline Schiff are back in the kitchen for revenge after Bobby Flay beat them with something sweet. Michael Symon and Josh Capon judge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Bobby Flay may have co-starred with her on "Entourage," but tonight Perrey Reeves is co-starring with "Chopped" vet Scott Conant to tarnish Bobby's record.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: So Many Obstacles
programme.desc: Chef Anne Burrell and Olympian Apolo Ohno are going for the gold as they pit Italian chef Michele Castelli against New England chef Brian Miller. It's up to them to pick the strongest culinary athlete they think can torch Bobby Flay!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Do or Die
programme.desc: It's all on the line when Tex-Mex master Gregory Webb faces off against New Jersey's Peter Morris in this battle for supremacy. Tough New York City chefs Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian have the call on who's got the skills to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Surprise Surprise!
programme.desc: The Windy City's Pat Sheerin and Chinese-American caterer Katie Chin are hoping that what they've got up their sleeves will be enough to send Bobby Flay packing.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mavericks
programme.desc: Trash talk is in the air when Iron Chef Michael Symon and Author and TV Host Daphne Oz arrive in the arena to beat up on their friend Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Little Bit Country
programme.desc: Lee Frank and Joe Wolfson vie to bump Bobby Flay from the top of the charts.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's All Gravy
programme.desc: Saturday Night Live's Ego Nwodim tag-teams with Bobby Flay's pal, Chef Michael Symon, to improvise their way to a win in Bobby's kitchen. Rock-star chefs Brandon Baltzley and Bill Crites must think on the fly if they want to walk out with a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: America's Funniest Food Show
programme.desc: Things get zany in the kitchen when the king of dad jokes, actor and comedian Bob Saget, teams up with Worst Cooks' Anne Burrell to get the last laugh on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Sour Out
programme.desc: Beach Bites' Katie Lee and Chopped's Marc Murphy conspire to take down Bobby Flay. They're counting on native Italian chef Silvia Baldini and California chef Austin Cobb to make their day and beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Blast From The Past
programme.desc: Bobby Flay is haunted when Food Network's Amanda Freitag and Katie Lee bring two ghosts from his past to the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rotten Tomatoes for Bobby
programme.desc: Chopped judge Scott Contant and actress Helene Yorke are out for blood. Chefs Andre Fowles and Darren Saypharaj battle to get to Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Going Loco
programme.desc: Buffalo chef Mike Andrzejewski and rural but refined chef Anthony Nelson arrive in the big city to duke it out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Finding Stars
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis and People Magazine's Jess Cagle reach for the stars when they match up Atlanta's dynamic Greek chef Pano Karatassos and New York City's Mimi Weissenborn to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Cream Of The Crop

programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Deceit

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Femme Fatale

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Friend Left Behind

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Girl in the Grave

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Deadly Premonition

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: First Love, Last Breath

programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Feline and Sinker
programme.desc: From gimpy goats to belligerent bulls, families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: Over at the Michigan Renaissance Festival, Dr. Pol takes a look at the hooves of a limping horse named Maverick, a jousting giant scheduled to compete at that day's tournament.

programme.title: Alaska Animal Rescue: The Naughty Otter
programme.desc: Rescue teams have their hands full as newborn orphans arrive at the Alaska Sealife Center.

programme.title: NASA's Greatest Missions: Hubble: Quest for Discovery
programme.desc: In 1990, the Hubble Space Telescope launched into orbit and became one of the most productive scientific instruments ever known to humankind; now, NASA astronauts reveal the extraordinary missions that have kept this sophisticated machine in operation.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: NASA Mars Landing: Inside the Mission
programme.desc: After a six-month journey, NASA's Perseverance rover arrives on Mars to explore brand-new mysteries on the Red Planet; behind-the-scenes access reveals the dramatic final moments of its voyage, how experts pulled it off, and what they hope to discover.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Alien Base
programme.desc: Abandoned hangers and bunkers populate a bizarre facility in the middle of nowhere, but among them are other structures whose purpose are oddly obscured; experts investigate a highly-classified military cover-up with extraterrestrial objectives.

programme.title: NASA Mars Landing: Inside the Mission
programme.desc: After a six-month journey, NASA's Perseverance rover arrives on Mars to explore brand-new mysteries on the Red Planet; behind-the-scenes access reveals the dramatic final moments of its voyage, how experts pulled it off, and what they hope to discover.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Finding Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Amelia Earhart's disappearance is one of America's greatest unsolved mysteries, but now, forensic science might finally crack the case, as experts examine human remains that could be proof positive of her whereabouts.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Death Relic of Christ
programme.desc: The Shroud of Turin is alleged to be the actual burial cloth of Jesus Christ. It could be a total hoax; now, scientists use cutting-edge forensic analysis to finally determine the truth behind this astonishing holy relic.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Yellowstone Supervolcano
programme.desc: Beneath Yellowstone National Park is one of the world's largest active volcanos, and it's poised to erupt at any moment; experts use seismic technology and visual imaging to reveal its catastrophic threat.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Scorpion
programme.desc: A nuclear submarine spying on Soviet maneuvers goes missing and its wreckage is mysteriously found on the ocean floor. The US Navy claims it was an accident, but declassified documents reveal startling new information that points to a Cold War cover up.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Antarctic Trail of Doom
programme.desc: The Scott Antarctic Expedition aspired to conquer the South Pole before anyone else, but this great endeavor of exploration never returned; now, newly uncovered evidence suggests this team may have succumbed to something more sinister than harsh elements.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Search for Nefertiti's Mummy
programme.desc: New technology might help experts track down Nefertiti's missing mummy, an investigation that could reveal new secrets about one of ancient Egypt's most powerful women.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse
programme.desc: The latest scientific investigations reveals the untold story of how a cataclysmic eruption transformed an entire region.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: When recent high school graduate Stephanie Neiman gives her friend Summer Hair a ride in small town Oklahoma, what starts out as a favor quickly becomes a struggle to survive.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Chi Town Gossip
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a local icon upends a tight-knit Chicago community. Neighbors whisper about the killer's identity and detectives must break down walls of silence to uncover the shocking plot to murder a mother and owner of a successful hair salon.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: American Nightmare: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Winter in Iowa gets an extra chill when Shirley Wilson's son finds her stabbed to death in her home. With no forced entry, detectives believe this grandmother of 12 knew her assailant, leaving the family wondering who has betrayed them in cold blood.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mistress Roulette
programme.desc: Dr. Adam Frasch has a dangerous secret: he has an insatiable appetite for women. He collects them as he does exotic cars, but unlike cars, he stashes them in his various properties, hiding them from one another, and especially his wife.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Not In My House
programme.desc: A mother and daughter rent out two rooms of their house to old family friends. But as the new roommates grow closer, alliances start to shift and tempers flare until it all comes to a bloody end.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Not In My House
programme.desc: A mother and daughter rent out two rooms of their house to old family friends. But as the new roommates grow closer, alliances start to shift and tempers flare until it all comes to a bloody end.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mistress Roulette
programme.desc: Dr. Adam Frasch has a dangerous secret: he has an insatiable appetite for women. He collects them as he does exotic cars, but unlike cars, he stashes them in his various properties, hiding them from one another, and especially his wife.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Midlife Crisis
programme.desc: After a string of bad dates, Texas social worker Deborah Houchin believes she's finally found the man of her dreams. But not long after talk turns to marriage, Deborah disappears. It will take the help of her coworkers to find out what happened.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Two teenagers in love go missing from rural Ohio. Ten days later, they both turn up dead - brutally hacked to bits. The crime tears the small town apart and remains unsolved for 25 years, until the shocking truth comes to light.

programme.title: Deadly Deception: The Blame Game
programme.desc: In Minnesota, 41-year-old Brett Struck is baking Valentine's Day cookies for his new girlfriend when his ex, Rochelle Inselman, shows up unannounced and old grudges quickly bubble to the surface.

programme.title: Deadly Deception: Innocent No More
programme.desc: A Staten Island family reunion dredges up catastrophic memories. Not everyone is willing to forgive the sins of the past, and someone is going pay with their life.

programme.title: Dangerous Persuasions: He's My Master
programme.desc: Librarian Sarah Rose abandons her family and friends to go on the road with a mysterious spiritual guru 'Master David'. It soon turns into a horrific journey of brutal violence at the hands of the teacher she worshipped. It's only when she fears for her.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: True Bromance
programme.desc: Bored and rich, Alabama teen Nathan Lee partners with local loafer Troy Smiley to hunt the most dangerous game - humans! But when the pair kills a young friend, Blake Stone, they turn the tables and convince police that Blake's step-mom is the murderer.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Lust for Murder
programme.desc: When Stacie Smith is found dead and an accusation that she has been unfaithful is written on the wall of the crime scene, police believe that a jealous lover is behind her brutal death. But that might just be a ploy to frame the wrong man for the crime.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: A life spared by a jury's mistake; a brawl after a delayed hearing; a man wearing no pants walks into a courthouse.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No, You Don't!
programme.desc: In Florida, a woman shopping for bathing suits bravely chases after a man who harasses her and learns that he's a predator who's been preying on women for years. And then, two good samaritans intervene when an elderly couple is robbed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Surprise Attack
programme.desc: An afternoon motorcycle ride turns into a violent road rage incident when a couple is attacked by an angry driver. And then, when a young woman working alone is robbed at knifepoint, she bravely fights back, fending off her assailant.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Baby Hope
programme.desc: A grisly discovery in a picnic cooler on a highway in upper Manhattan leads detectives down a twisting trail of clues as they try to solve one of the longest-running mysteries in the New York Post's history, and hunt down a deranged child killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Face and a Voice
programme.desc: When a beautiful young school teacher is murdered in her home, police must rely on the eye witness testimony of a young neighbour who saw her killer lurking outside her window.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: The Real Don of New York
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York. When FBI realised their mistake, they would stop at nothing to take him down.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Sam Giancana: Mafia vs. CIA
programme.desc: We reveal the secrets of the Mafia's most notorious members, beginning with Sam Giancana, who was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra, and the CIA.

programme.title: Mob Boss: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence, but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Montana Barn Battle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders square off against their toughest barn yet- a stubborn old timber frame with wooden pegs, metal spikes, steel bolts and a whole lot of beams. But saving this barn is worth the effort because it will be rebuilt for a veterans group.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Operation Hero
programme.desc: Mark and his team take on their hardest build ever for their most important client: America's wounded warriors. The guys work side by side with veterans to construct a giant timber frame lodge for Project Healing Waters.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Sparks Are Flying
programme.desc: Experienced pickers Heshy and Michael go toe-to-toe with fashionable friends Holly and Carlyle, as each team gets $500 to find, fix, and flip pieces they'll buy at the Brimfield Antique Show in Brimfield, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: It's About Flipping Time
programme.desc: Style hunters go up against a competitive husband and wife team.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Pizza Party
programme.desc: There's so much to love about pizza- crispy crust, savory sauce, ooey-gooey cheese and endless options for toppings. Pizza might just be the perfect meal, and Eddie Jackson has a day full of out-of-the-box slices to prove it.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Flavors of the World
programme.desc: From Cuban cuisine to South Korea's legendary dishes, Eddie Jackson brings a taste of delicious, authentic flavors from around the world to please the taste buds.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion
programme.desc: Nothing makes a special occasion more memorable than having the best food! We're counting down the best meals for any special occasion, starting with Beau MacMillan's unforgettable gnocchi in San Diego.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Central New York
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights the local favorites in central New York, finding beef and veal sausages at one of America's oldest hot dog stands, half-moon cookies that predate New York City's iconic black and white cookie and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Hawaii's Big Island to take in its laid-back cuisine. From ancient traditions like lau lau and opakapaka fish to new traditions like the loco moco and huli chicken, he dives deep into the island's food culture.

programme.title: Movie: Five Star Christmas
programme.desc: When a travel writer shows up unexpectedly at their dad's B&B, the Ralston family all pretend to be guests in hopes of a good review.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness
programme.desc: Rose has a new man, Carl, in her life but suddenly out of the blue Miles returns, still undercover in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: Frasier: The Crucible
programme.desc: Frasier throws a dinner party to showcase his new painting, only to have the artist declare it a forgery. His attempt at retribution is foiled by a frightened Niles.

programme.title: Frasier: Call Me Irresponsible
programme.desc: After advising a caller to break up with his girlfriend, Frasier begins dating her.

programme.title: Frasier: Beloved Infidel
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier suspect Martin may have had an affair during their childhood.

programme.title: Frasier: Selling Out
programme.desc: Frasier learns how much he could earn from personal endorsements and he starts doing ads.

programme.title: Frasier: Oops
programme.desc: Bulldog quits after hearing a rumour that he is about to be fired from the station.

programme.title: Frasier: Death Becomes Him
programme.desc: Frasier becomes obsessed with his own mortality when a man his age suddenly drops dead. He sets out to determine how the man could have died so young.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: Movie: Karen Kingsbury's A Time to Dance
programme.desc: John and Abby have fallen out of love, but when they help their daughter plan her wedding, they just might find love once again.

programme.title: Movie: Romance in the Air
programme.desc: A woman is reunited with her childhood friend, and finds the love she was missing.

programme.title: Movie: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was eight. Faced with old feelings, he will discover what really matters in life.

programme.title: Movie: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: An aspiring chef tries to win a food-truck competition, while her competitor tries to win her heart.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A filthy-rich family suddenly finds themselves broke and are forced to move to a small, depressing town called Schitt's Creek, a town they once bought as a joke.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Candidate
programme.desc: Johnny contemplates running for Town Council. David and Stevie look for love in all the wrong places while Alexis comes to terms with single life.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation

programme.desc: Dave runs for office and shows how much cooler everything would be in slow motion.

programme.desc: Dave shows us what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Blackstar.

programme.desc: Dave looks at TV gambling sensation the World Series of Dice; Eddie Griffin guest stars with musical guests Common and Kanye West.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Kamiyah Mobley Story with Robin Roberts
programme.desc: Kamiyah Mobley, now 21, sits down exclusively with the award-winning journalist for a revealing interview about life since her true identity was exposed.

programme.title: Movie: Stolen By My Mother: The Kamiyah Mobley Story
programme.desc: After a miscarriage, a young woman poses as a nurse and steals a mother's baby leading to a lifetime of uncertainty.

programme.title: Movie: Abducted: The Mary Stauffer Story
programme.desc: Following the abduction of high school teacher and her young daughter by her obsessed former student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy to the Rescue
programme.desc: Parker's crew tallies up all the gold from the Last Cut and rushes to mine out the Airstrip Cut. Freddy and Juan answer an SOS call from Fred Lewis. Tony drains a massive holding pond to get his operation back up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Viking Detective
programme.desc: Parker and crew face a potentially catastrophic flood at the Airstrip Cut. Tony uncovers a secret patch of gold-rich ground at Paradise Hill and logs his biggest gold weigh of the year. Rick throttles up his operation with a new water system.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When mechanic Carl is forced to leave the claim for an emergency surgery, Rick's team bands together to stay on the gold. Fred's crew step up after their loader dies. Tony pays the price for ignoring a long overdue upgrade.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Gurus
programme.desc: Experts step in to help the miners of Gold Rush with technology, ingenuity and mechanical innovation to find the most prized element in human history.

programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Ultra High Proof
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make a Prohibition-era classic: moonshine up to an ultra-high 180 proof. Building their own stills and mash, only one can be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: George Washington Rye
programme.desc: Three distillers compete to make a recipe created by George Washington himself. Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only one competitor can earn the prestigious title of Master Distiller for producing the first president's own signature liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caught Red-Handed
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws recruit Josh to build a winter-proof still site. Mountain man Mark converts a free load of sugar beets into high-proof moonshine. Mike and Jerry crack a few nuts to turn their column-distilled liquor into southern pecan liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Digger find a solution to the jar shortage but the juice may not be worth the squeeze. Tim enlists Tickle's friend Howard to help recreate the first whiskey made in America. Mike and Jerry distill vodka from surplus restaurant supplies.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bugged Out: A Worm Delight

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bugged Out: Tiny Predators

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Surprise in Disguise

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Mayhem on Main Street

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Downhill Slide

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Hot Tub House

programme.desc: When the team walks into this zombie house, gets bitten by the fleas in the carpet, and then hit with a putrid smell, it looks like this will be their biggest challenge to date.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: A Million Dollar Gamble
programme.desc: At first, this tiny zombie house seems like a tear down and most of the team wants to build two new houses in its place. Duke convinces the others to save the house and its vintage bathrooms and breaks his promise to keep this flip quick and easy.

programme.title: Matter of Fact: Listening Tour: The Hard Truth About Bias
programme.desc: This program examines how stereotypes are created and how they impact our views, beliefs and ultimately our actions. Through stories, the show creates an opportunity for viewers to engage in a respectful dialogue on race and social justice.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Trouble the Oil
programme.desc: The buyers dig deep in search of antiques and industrial merchandise. Jarrod and Brandi uncover what appears to be an antique wine rack. Dave Hester and Barry Weiss test each other's knowledge of oddities.

programme.title: Storage Wars: High End Heist
programme.desc: The buyers head to a high-end facility in the 'antiquers' town of Torrance, Calif., where the competition has never been stiffer. Dave and Jarrod bid on a unit with a classic Jaguar. Barry buys a locker to satisfy his adventurous spirit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Almost the Greatest Show on Earth
programme.desc: The auction turns into a circus as the buyers head to Irvine, California where tensions boil over.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hooray for Holly-Weird

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: The buyers negotiate the desert winds of Lancaster, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Tale of Two Jackets
programme.desc: The buyers make their Hollywood premiere, where Dave Hester continues his role as storage villain.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Modern Family: Virgin Territory
programme.desc: It's a day of disturbing realizations when Mitchell manages to ruin one of Jay's proudest golf moments, Phil overhears something that may forever change how he sees his little girl and Gloria stumbles upon Claire's dangerous little secret.

programme.title: Modern Family: Leap Day
programme.desc: Cameron's birthday falls on Leap Day, and with opportunities to celebrate so few and far between, the pressure for Mitchell to get it right is exceptional.

programme.title: Modern Family: Planes, Trains and Cars
programme.desc: Phil's judgment becomes clouded when he goes car shopping with his new buddy, Andre. Meanwhile, Jay is determined to get to his high school reunion with Gloria and Manny in tow, and Lily loses her favourite stuffed animal on a public metro train.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Spectacular

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hearty Home Cookin'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Baltimore, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy's hitting the pavement for a tasty tour of Baltimore. First, just off Dundalk Ave., a local legend cranks out all kinds of crab plates. Then, in the Hamilton neighbourhood, a farm-to-table spot cooks up bacon-wrapped meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' the Italian Countryside

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Pie

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy checks out BBQ in New Orleans, San Antonio and Mississippi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Cookin'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Say That Again
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits three joints with the same name twice, such as Pok Pok, Tap Tap and Niko Nikos. He visits an old gas station in Houston, a Haitian restaurant in Miami Beach and a walk-up or dine-in place in Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: California Comfort

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade examines newly declassified files that may reveal an unexplained encounter between the US Navy and UFOs. Later, he uses cutting-edge military technology to uncover the truth behind Pablo Escobar's lost treasure.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer

programme.title: River Monsters: Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest to battle an ancient river monster said to rise from the murky depths to attack swimmers.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade examines newly declassified files that may reveal an unexplained encounter between the US Navy and UFOs. Later, he uses cutting-edge military technology to uncover the truth behind Pablo Escobar's lost treasure.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest to battle an ancient river monster said to rise from the murky depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters: The Mutilator

programme.title: River Monsters: Cold Blooded Horror
programme.desc: The River Monsters in Japan are like no others Jeremy has ever encountered, from the devastating earthquake-causing catfish, the Namazu, to the sinister, child-snatching killer called the Kappa.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Momma's Surprise
programme.desc: A sea lion called Finn has tummy trouble and the team feeds him a snack that will help them investigate why. Big Mama the guitarfish may be living up to her name, and the boa-duo Ripley and Ridley receive a new home.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Maggie the Magnificent
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to monitor beluga whale activity. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's training kicks in when receiving a shot, and Morty the sea star undergoes a checkup after suspicious growths form.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ghost Gators
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection, and divers must swim with Taroko the whale shark to get a blood sample.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Expedition Whale Shark
programme.desc: Aquarium staff travel to the remote island of St. Helena to gain footage of whale sharks in their natural habitat during mating season. Spotted ribbontail ray Francis is introduced to her new tank friends, and Cerbie the seal is treated for joint pain.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Fawns Become Friends
programme.desc: Two sickly newborn fawns form an unbreakable bond while they are hand-reared by staff. Leopard Khazo gets a surprise that enhances her life, and tensions run high as the reptile staff attempts to collect blood from Cuban crocs.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: Movie: Waist Deep
programme.desc: A former convict is placed in a bad situation when his son is kidnapped in a carjacking. Now with a ransom demand of $100,000 he must break the law to rescue his son with the aid of a street-smart hustler.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood

programme.title: House Hunters: Emotion Over Investment in Dallas
programme.desc: A first time buyer is excited to purchase a home that can also be a future rental investment in Dallas. He's looking for a two bedroom condo with an open style, but his best friend thinks he should find a place that he will enjoy as a home for himself.

programme.title: House Hunters: Never-Ending New Jersey Hunt
programme.desc: A couple is eager to get out of their tiny New York apartment and into a bigger place in New Jersey. They're looking for a home with a fenced-in yard for their dog, and she wants something very modern, but he prefers an older place with lots of character.

programme.title: House Hunters: You Can Put a Price on Happiness
programme.desc: A sports news reporter and his wife are starting a family and look to purchase their first home near Washington, DC. They're looking for a grand home with curb appeal and plenty of outdoor space, but he doesn't want to spend the money for a turnkey house.

programme.title: House Hunters: To Buy or Rent in Fort Lauderdale
programme.desc: A Chicago couple struggles to commit to buying a home after a recent move to Fort Lauderdale, Florida. She's looking for a single family house with a yard for their dogs, but he's only interested in something that's low maintenance at a good price.

programme.title: House Hunters: Going Rogue in Maryland
programme.desc: A couple with energetic twin toddlers is looking for a waterfront home in Annapolis, Maryland. He's looking for something contemporary and new and doesn't mind paying for it, but she wants a cozy farmhouse at the low end of their price range.

programme.title: House Hunters: Country Life for Family of Seven in Georgia
programme.desc: A family of seven relocates for a job opportunity and looks for a new home in Atlanta. She wants something move-in ready with a lot of land for a potential farm, but he prefers a home that's impressive and grand, and doesn't mind projects to save money.

programme.title: House Hunters: Wow Factor in Dallas
programme.desc: A former pro football player and his wife search for a house with 'wow' factor in Dallas. For him, that means a place with ultra-contemporary style, like he saw in movies growing up, but for her it means a chateau-style home, which creeps him out.

programme.title: House Hunters: Getting Back Into Trouble in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A family that lost their home during a financial hardship is looking to purchase a home in Stevens Point, Wisconsin. He's willing to push their price point to the max, but she wants to stay under budget.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Building a New Life Together
programme.desc: Two engaged police officers have been living in a cramped trailer on rural land they have been trying to clear themselves. Brian and Mika take over the heavy equipment and build this couple's dream home so that they can actually plan their wedding!

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: A Tale of Two Cories
programme.desc: A single dad and his daughter want to build a dream home and gain a sense of stability after renting for over a decade. The daughter is obsessed with the colour blue, so Mika must find a way to incorporate it into the design.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Shared Space to Dream Place
programme.desc: A couple bought their dream property years ago but are living with his mother due to financial setbacks. The family is ready to build a home of their own, but Brian and Mika must find a way to combine her understated style with his over-the-top taste.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Seventh Time's the Charm
programme.desc: A family of four has lived in six homes over the past 10 years while trying to find their perfect fit. Brian and Mika help them build a home that they think is just right, but when their plans fall through, they'll have to double down to not disappoint.

programme.desc: A hunter's death has authorities tracking a killer, but the trail leads surprisingly close to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Wendy Cobb
programme.desc: A suspicious fire and a secret lover lead officials to ask if the wife was involved.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Bryan
programme.desc: A suspicious shooting reveals a pretty real estate agent’s scandalous secret life.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Waiting
programme.desc: When a captivating, sweet natured single mom was found dead in her garage, detectives in Frisco, Texas uncovered a series of potential suspects, all of them connected in different ways to her complicated and secretive life.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Triangle
programme.desc: How long does it take a killer to stop worrying if they'll ever be caught. If they're still free then maybe they got away with murder. The trail goes cold, never to warm up again until one day it does.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Horror in the Home
programme.desc: Kelly & Steve Spingola partner once again to work with the Potter County Sheriff’s Department in Texas in investigating the brutal murder of a doting mother of four.

programme.title: Snapped: Julia Phillips
programme.desc: A woman is attached and her wealthy lover killed, but police soon question her story.

programme.title: Snapped: Lupita Acuna
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads investigators to a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Bernadette Perusquia
programme.desc: A school nurse pulls the trigger; was it self-defence or did she commit murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Nightfall
programme.desc: After a young mom is found dead on the side of a country road, 40 miles from her Knoxville home, investigators scramble to figure out how she ended up there.

programme.title: Dateline: Black Friday
programme.desc: Fort Worth, Texas police are called to the scene of a brutal murder on Black Friday. The victim is beloved by friends, girlfriends and coworkers. She seemed to have no enemies, but did she?

programme.title: Exhumed: A Murderer Among Us
programme.desc: When grandmother Erma Prince dies after a simple hip surgery, fears spread that a killer nurse could be responsible. The police do everything they can to track down the killer including exhuming Erma's body.

programme.title: Exhumed: Killer Cowboy
programme.desc: On April 28th, 1982, two men fishing east of Nashville, TN discovered a decaying body in the woods, later identified as Gene Stump. Detectives find a suspect, but only an exhumation will ensure justice is served.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Death by Divorce
programme.desc: A mother of five is found dead in her home. Was she murdered, or was she hiding a dark secret?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Revenge Killings
programme.desc: A killer targets a town's law enforcement community.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: Annie Kasprzak has a second chance at a happy life after being adopted by her case worker. Then, the 15-year-old vanishes. Her parents find a note in her room that reveals a secret Annie has been hiding.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: It was Friday the 13th and something sinister was about to happen: a chilling double murder in an upscale home. The evidence seemed to tell a clear story. Then investigators discovered a marriage filled with secrets and a story that didn't add up.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Texas Twist
programme.desc: Named for the body of Christ, Corpus Christi sits on the Texas gulf coast. This part of the Lone Star State is largely sheltered from hurricanes. But as it turned out, not from one unnatural disaster.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: It was a brutal and baffling crime: a husband shot dead in his own bed. No one else in the house was hurt, not even his wife, who was sleeping beside him. Investigators were suspicious, but there were more surprises in store.

programme.title: Movie: Escape Room
programme.desc: Six complete strangers all receive invitations to test out a new escape room, with $1 million up for grabs if they can find their way out, but once inside they discover that its puzzles are sadistically designed and are killing them off one by one.

programme.title: The Simpsons: YOLO
programme.desc: Marge encourages Homer to embrace his 'You Only Live Once' spirit by inviting an old pen pal to stay with him and cross items off of his 'to-do' list from when he was a 10-year-old. Meanwhile, Lisa institutes a new honour code at Springfield Elementary.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Labor Pains
programme.desc: Homer remembers his Lamaze skills when he's forced to deliver a baby in an elevator. When the mother names the child Homer Jr., he quickly develops a deep emotional bond with the kid. Lisa is recruited by the cheerleaders of the local pro football team.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kid Is All Right
programme.desc: Lisa finally makes a new best friend, Isabel Gutierrez, only to discover that she's a Republican and her opponent in the campaign for second grade class representative.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yellow Subterfuge
programme.desc: Principal Skinner promises the students that the best-behaved among them can take a ride in a submarine. When Skinner gives all the kids a clean slate, Bart believes even his own past indiscretions will be forgotten.

programme.title: The Simpsons: White Christmas Blues
programme.desc: Springfield is inundated with holiday revellers after the nuclear power plant springs a radiation leak, causing snow to fall all over town. When the tourists drive up Christmas shopping prices, Marge opens up the Simpsons' house to boarders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Steal This Episode
programme.desc: Homer becomes annoyed with movie theatres, so Bart teaches him how to download movies illegally. Homer is delighted with his discovery of free movies until he's caught for piracy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Comic Book Guy realizes his comics are nothing if he can't share them with anyone. Then he meets Kumiko, a Japanese woman writing an autobiographical manga, and he seeks out Homer's advice on how to date her, ending happily for everyone.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Diggs
programme.desc: Bart is rescued from a confrontation with Springfield Elementary's bullies by Diggs, a recent transfer student and aspiring champion in the niche sport of falconry. But, Bart soon discovers that Diggs wants to do more than just wrangle falcons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Grew Too Much
programme.desc: On a research trip, Lisa is shocked to discover that Sideshow Bob is now the chief scientist at a massive chemical engineering company, but her fears are allayed as she becomes enamoured with his likeminded appreciation of high-culture.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Winter of His Content
programme.desc: Marge invites Grampa and two other octogenarians to live at the Simpsons’ house after the Retirement Castle is closed for health violations, but she quickly becomes frustrated with Homer when he starts embracing the 'old person lifestyle.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The War of Art
programme.desc: After Lisa's new pet guinea pig destroys the Simpsons' living room art, Marge falls in love with a beautiful painting at the Van Houten's yard sale that Homer snaps up for $20.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Don't Have to Live Like a Referee
programme.desc: Homer is recruited as a World Cup referee after Lisa extols his integrity on the youth soccer field in a Springfield Elementary speech contest. But when the Simpsons travel to Brazil, Homer finds his honesty tested by a gangster in the bribing business.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: Brian's marriage to Jess is not what he envisioned, especially after her miraculous recovery from cancer. At the suggestion of Peter, Brian lets himself go, causing Jess to make a surprising decision.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Arrivals/ Departures
programme.desc: Archer helps Lana with the delivery of her baby, while Krieger tries to prevent the delivery of a deadly weapon.
